columns.Name: POSITION_SECURITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: VIEW_ALL
columns.Comments: This option provides unrestricted security access to the specific position security profile.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Denotes name for the Position Security Profile.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This field represents whether a position security profile is enabled or disabled. When it is enabled, it can be associated with a role.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_AOR
columns.Comments: This option allows users to restrict person security profiles based on areas of responsibility.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description for the position security profile.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_POSITION_HIERARCHY
columns.Comments: This option allows users to restrict positions based on position hierarchy in a position security profile.

columns.Name: POS_HIERARCHY_TREE_STRUCT_CODE
columns.Comments: Code representing the selected position tree structure used in a position hierarchy.

columns.Name: POS_HIERARCHY_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: When securing by position hierarchy, this is the name of the position tree.

columns.Name: TOP_POS_SELECTION
columns.Comments: When securing position security profile by position tree, this option indicates the top position.

columns.Name: POS_HIERARCHY_CONTENT
columns.Comments: This option indicates position hierarchy content to be used for top position identification.

columns.Name: TOP_POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: A position security profile can be secured by position trees. This option which when enabled, restricts the security up to that position selected as a top position in the tree.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_TOP_POSITION
columns.Comments: This option on the position security profile restricts the security access up to that position selected as a top position in the tree.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_BUSINESS_UNIT
columns.Comments: This option allows users to restrict positions based on a list of business units from a selected organization security profile.

columns.Name: BU_ORG_SECURITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: The unique organization security profile used to identify the list of business units secured by the position security profile.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_DEPARTMENT
columns.Comments: This option allows users to restrict the position security profile based on a set of departments defined by an organization security profile.

columns.Name: DEPT_ORG_SECURITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: The unique organization security profile used to identify the list of departments secured by the position security profile.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_JOB
columns.Comments: Attribute not in use - leave blank

columns.Name: JOB_SECURITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_JOB_SECURITY_PROFILES table.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Attribute not in use - leave blank

columns.Name: LOC_SECURITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Location security profiles are not in use - leave blank

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_POSITION_LIST
columns.Comments: Secure data based on a list of positions

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_FUTURE_POSITIONS
columns.Comments: INCLUDE_FUTURE_POSITIONS

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
